description: Vendor the Mermaid runtime OFFLINE into Charter.Core so a rendered :::diagram opens standalone (invariant 1 - portable artifact): drop a pinned mermaid minified build at src/Charter.Core/assets/mermaid.min.js (version-pinned + attributed), embed it in Charter.Core.csproj as an EmbeddedResource with LogicalName Charter.Core.mermaid.min.js, and add a MermaidResource loader (mirroring Charter.Server.SdkResource) that reads the embedded library back so CharterRenderer can INLINE it into the artifact - NOT a CDN <script src>. If the pinned library cannot be obtained, honest-halt via needsHuman rather than committing a truncated/placeholder file.
